Name: Argo - Rollouts Status
Description:
Gets the status of an Argo Rollout.
Note: A timeout isn't considered an error, it will return the status at the time of the timeout.

Parameters.Name: Argo.Rollout.Name
Parameters.Label: Rollout Name
Parameters.HelpText: Name of the Argo Rollout to promote.

Parameters.Name: Argo.Rollout.Namespace
Parameters.Label: Namespace
Parameters.HelpText: The namespace to execute the promotion of the rollout against.

Parameters.Name: Argo.Rollout.Timeout
Parameters.Label: Timeout
Parameters.HelpText: The length of time to watch before giving up. Non-zero values should contain a corresponding time unit (e.g. 1s, 2m, 3h). Zero means wait forever.
